product_name: Custom 20ft Shipping Container Home With Water Tank
product_description:
Custom 20ft Shipping Container Home With Water Tank Ideal For:
 • Off-grid living enthusiasts
 • Remote getaway cabins
 • Eco-retreats & Airbnb hosts
 • Affordable housing developments
 • Urban infill or backyard ADUs
Custom 20ft Shipping Container Home With Water Tank for Sale
Step into the future of minimalist living with our Custom 20ft Shipping Container Home With Water Tank, an eco-conscious sanctuary designed for functionality, style, and sustainability. Featuring an integrated water tank and efficient floor plan, this home is ideal for off-grid adventures, minimalist lifestyles, or modern retreats in remote locations.
Crafted from a durable steel container, the unit provides a cozy yet efficient space with a fully equipped kitchen, a comfortable bathroom, and a flexible sleeping or living area. Its modular footprint and optional upper loft structure add creative vertical space, making it as practical as it is visually striking.
Whether you’re escaping to the countryside, setting up a secondary dwelling, or launching a micro-living community, this unit delivers smart, sustainable living in a sleek steel frame.
 
 Specifications Overview
